items: Exchange from RNG to HI for SMs and making sure all traceability is maintained
For CART 1.5.1, exchange is planned by ECT.
Exchange from DNG to HI for SMs delivered by Germany CART. If this exchange is not supported by CART team, then we need to find a way by ourselves to achieve this.
